title: AMD revives Zen 2 Ryzen 7 4700LE processor for budget PCs with RTX 3050
summary: The four-year-old processor reappears in an $800 pre-built, offering an affordable option with DDR4.

title: AMD Zen 6 Medusa Point 10-core APU outperforms Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 in Geekbench
summary: Early benchmarks show up to a 22% improvement over current high-end processors, according to leaks.

title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 as preferred model for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup speculation
summary: The new family of AI models is positioned as the recommended one for Microsoft's productivity suite.

title: Fidji Simo, head of AGI deployment at OpenAI, leaves position
summary: The executive responsible for general AI implementation leaves the number two post at the company.

title: Meta launches Muse Spark 1.1, its new AI model for programming tasks
summary: The AI tool for developers seeks to compete in the growing market of coding assistants.

title: Meta will allow its AI to generate images using public Instagram photos
summary: The new generative AI tool draws from public content, raising concerns about user privacy.

title: Minisforum unveils mini workstation with 128 GB of RAM and support for discrete GPUs
summary: The new Panther Lake model offers high performance in a compact form factor, ideal for professionals with limited space.

title: TCL launches Mini LED monitors with refresh rates up to 1080 Hz and affordable 4K options
summary: New panels combine high refresh rates with Mini LED technology to enhance gaming and productivity experiences.

title: AMD expands Ryzen 200 and 100 families with 11 new Hawk Point CPUs based on Zen 4 architecture
summary: The company adds more processor variants for laptops and low-power devices, expanding its market offering.

title: China builds its own chip market amid U.S. sanctions and forges alliances with Russia
summary: Export restrictions are accelerating the development of the local semiconductor industry and a potential Sino-Russian alliance.

title: OpenAI launches GPT-Live, a voice model with simultaneous listening and speaking capabilities
summary: The new system enables more natural real-time conversations by processing audio input and output simultaneously.

title: Multiple vulnerabilities discovered that allow tricking AI agents into executing malicious code
summary: Attacks like HalluSquatting and GhostApproval exploit hallucinations and symmetry flaws to compromise the security of autonomous agents.

title: European Parliament approves chat monitoring and extends message tracking until 2028
summary: The regulation allows companies like Meta, Google, and Microsoft to continue monitoring communications, despite rejection by the parliamentary majority.

title: TypeScript 7.0 released with compiler in Go and up to 12x performance
summary: The new version of the programming language promises much faster compilation, improving developer productivity.

title: PostgreSQL rewritten in Rust and passes all regression tests
summary: The project demonstrates that it is possible to migrate the database to a memory-safe language without losing compatibility or performance.

title: npm 12 disables installation scripts by default to mitigate supply chain attacks
summary: The new version of the package manager removes automatic code execution during installation, reducing security risks.

title: DuckDuckGo browser automatically blocks YouTube ads
summary: The privacy feature prevents ad playback on the video platform on both desktop and mobile devices.

title: Meta announces that its new AI chips will start production in September
summary: Custom AI processors will reduce dependence on external suppliers and improve efficiency.

title: Samsung ventures into laptop chip market with 4nm Exynos GAIA
summary: The new processor, already in sampling phase with partners, will directly compete with Intel and AMD solutions in laptops.

title: The New York Times accuses OpenAI of hiding evidence in copyright lawsuit
summary: The newspaper alleges that the AI company withheld evidence about the use of protected content to train ChatGPT.
